metadata.description: BioGuard AI — Dhaka Travel Corridor Definitions for W-DZMI OSRM Routing Signal

corridors.name: Uttara — Farmgate (Airport Road)
corridors.description: Major arterial: connects north Dhaka to central business via Shahjalal Airport

corridors.name: Mirpur — Farmgate (Mirpur Road)
corridors.description: Heavily used: 2M+ daily commuters on Mirpur Road corridor

corridors.name: Gulshan — Motijheel (Hatirjheel Link)
corridors.description: Hatirjheel route: diplomatic zone to financial district

corridors.name: Dhanmondi — Farmgate
corridors.description: Short high-traffic link between hospital cluster and transit hub

corridors.name: Badda — Motijheel (Badda Link Road)
corridors.description: East Dhaka residential to CBD, growing traffic volume

corridors.name: Uttara — Gulshan (Airport Road)
corridors.description: Airport to diplomatic zone, high vehicle volume

corridors.name: Mirpur — Dhanmondi (Mirpur Road)
corridors.description: Northwest residential to hospital cluster, continuous bus route

corridors.name: Bashundhara — Gulshan
corridors.description: NSU research zone to commercial hub

corridors.name: Wari — Motijheel
corridors.description: Old Dhaka to CBD: extreme density, highest pedestrian traffic

corridors.name: Khilgaon — Motijheel
corridors.description: East-central residential to financial district

corridors.name: Uttara — Bashundhara
corridors.description: North residential cluster, moderate traffic

corridors.name: Mirpur — Agargaon
corridors.description: Residential to government district, peak hour congestion

corridors.name: Vatara — Gulshan
corridors.description: East residential to commercial, Pragati Sarani

corridors.name: Badda — Khilgaon
corridors.description: Adjacent residential zones, Badda-Rampura bridge

corridors.name: Dhanmondi — Wari (Old Dhaka Link)
corridors.description: Hospital cluster to Old Dhaka market area, high pedestrian

corridors.name: Farmgate — Motijheel
corridors.description: Central Dhaka spine: two biggest commercial nodes

corridors.name: Agargaon — Farmgate
corridors.description: Government district to transit hub, Rokeya Sarani

corridors.name: Diabari — Uttara
corridors.description: Peripheral to main residential, lower traffic

corridors.name: Dakshinkhan — Bashundhara
corridors.description: Outskirts to research zone, low traffic

corridors.name: Uttarkhan — Uttara
corridors.description: Northern periphery to Uttara proper, light traffic

corridors.name: Bashundhara — Badda
corridors.description: Adjacent east zones, Kuril-Bishwa Road

corridors.name: Khilgaon — Wari
corridors.description: East residential into Old Dhaka market area

corridors.name: Farmgate — Gulshan
corridors.description: Central to diplomatic, via Mohakhali flyover

corridors.name: Mirpur — Badda
corridors.description: Cross-city residential link, Mymensingh Road parallel

corridors.name: Dhanmondi — Ramna
corridors.description: Hospital cluster to university/government area, Manik Mia Ave
